name: File Was Not Allowed To Run
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pushkarev Dmitry
SIGMA Title: File Was Not Allowed To Run
SIGMA Description: Detect run not allowed files. Applocker is a very useful tool, especially on servers where unprivileged users have access. For example terminal servers. You need configure applocker and log collect to receive these events.

False positives:
- Need tuning applocker or add exceptions in SIEM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('8004', '8007', '8022', '8025') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY File Was Not Allowed To Run on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('8004', '8007', '8022', '8025') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: File Was Not Allowed To Run
